title: Three-lane civilian service plan; clearance-risk matrix SAFE/CAUTION/AVOID
public_claim: Three-lane civilian service plan; clearance-risk matrix SAFE/CAUTION/AVOID is a preserved project packet for this packet answers a specific and delicate question: what can an unemployed 34-year-old Georgetown Applied Intelligence master's student with limited Russian, no clearance, and no prior national-security employment do right now that is both genuinely useful to Ukrainians and strategically.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
